title: Intensely Sweet Ukrainian Amaretti Cookies
description: These tangy and crumbly cookies feature amaretti and a coconut cream crack, making for a nostalgic Ukrainian dish that is also raw-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the almond flour, crushed amaretti cookies, and shredded coconut.
In a separate bowl, mix together the coconut cream, honey, and vanilla extract.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
Cut into desired shapes using a cookie cutter.
Place the cookies on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 18 minutes, or until lightly golden.
Remove from the oven and allow to cool completely.
Drizzle with additional honey and sprinkle with lemon zest, if desired.
